nasb.text: So Moses did just as the Lord had commanded, and they went up to Mount Hor in the sight of all the congregation.

esv.text: Moses did as the Lord commanded. And they went up Mount Hor in the sight of all the congregation.

cnv.text: 摩西就照著耶和華吩咐的行了，三人當著全體會眾的眼前上了何珥山。

ccb.text: 摩西遵命而行。他们三人就当着全体会众的面上了何珥山。
